title: Section 2.3.1: Particle in a Box - Spatial Wavefunction

sections.id: Section 2.3.1 Particle in a Box - Spatial Wavefunction
sections.title: Section 2.3.1: Particle in a Box - Spatial Wavefunction

label.text: (Task 1.1)
Set the quantum number to 1, and note the number of peaks and location of the peak.
(Task 1.2)
Set the quantum number to 3, and note the number of peaks and location of the peaks.
(Task 1.3)
Set the quantum number to 5, and note the number of peaks and location of the peaks.
(Task 1.4)
Set the quantum number to 7, and note the number of peaks and location of the peaks.
(Task 1.5)
Set the quantum number to 9, and note the number of peaks and location of the peaks.
